title: lepidagathis dahomensis
intro: Lepidagathis dahomensis, a species of flowering plant, is a member of the family Acanthaceae and is native to Gabon in central Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lepidagathis dahomensis include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory infections, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and ointments.
